title: Irresistible Love prevents opponent magic plays while active

card.rawText: Your opponent cannot inflict damage or play magic cards. During each player's turn, your opponent may roll 1 die. If the result is 1-3, this effect ends and this card is sent to your cemetery.

plan.title: Irresistible Love prevents opponent magic plays while active
plan.summary: Play Irresistible Love as a field card and verify its opponent magic-play restriction is applied.

notes: Irresistible Love field text: your opponent cannot play magic cards while this effect is active.

steps: Verify the target player is under a Magic play restriction.

expectedAssertions.label: Irresistible Love is active on field

manualVerification: Player_2 should be unable to play Magic until the 1-3 escape roll ends this card.
riskNotes: This fixture checks the magic-play branch, not the separate damage-prevention branch.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_039_irresistible_love-039-e02 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
